name: Parakh Ek Dharohar
overview: A hidden identity, a family legacy, and a sacred test intertwine as Dev lives as Rumaal in Rishikesh, finding love with Rashmi while Bhoomika searches for him, unaware of the emotional storm and destiny awaiting them.
